agent_types.description: Posts the literal text HELLO WORLD once on each simulation round where the agent's activity profile is active.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Human-readable agent name stored in the YSocial experiment population.

parameters.name: activity_profile
parameters.description: Name of a simulation.activity_profiles entry from the client configuration.

parameters.name: daily_budget
parameters.description: Daily budget field persisted in the existing experiment population record.

agent_types.description: Scans recent unmoderated content during active slots, prioritizes reported or highly toxic posts, writes moderation notices into sys_messages, and marks moderated posts in the experiment database.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Human-readable agent name stored in the YSocial experiment population.

parameters.name: activity_profile
parameters.description: Name of a simulation.activity_profiles entry from the client configuration.

parameters.name: daily_budget
parameters.description: Daily budget field persisted in the existing experiment population record.

parameters.name: toxicity_threshold
parameters.description: Minimum toxicity score in post_toxicity.toxicity that makes an unmoderated post eligible for moderation. Must be in [0, 1].

parameters.name: moderation_time_span
parameters.description: Number of simulation rounds for which the system moderation notice stays visible in sys_messages.

parameters.name: moderation_action_type
parameters.description: Moderation strategy. 'one-fits-all' writes a standard notice, while 'personalized' requires a configured LangChain LLM model and generates a user-tailored notice.

parameters.name: candidate_window_rounds
parameters.description: Optional lookback window, in simulation rounds, used to search for recent unmoderated posts. Defaults to 1.
